TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kareem_Abdul-Jabbar, title = Kareem_Abdul-Jabbar, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kareem_Abdul-Jabbar} }

S.FORM: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar nalecuhan ciniza i 4 a bulad 16 a demiad, 1947 a mihcaan, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, miunduay.
S.PHON: karəəm abdur~ɾ-*abbar nar~ɾəʦuħan ʦiniza i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan, karəəm abdur~ɾ-*abbar, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Kareem Abdul-Jabbar nalecuhan ciniza i 4 a bulad 16 a demiad, 1947 a mihcaan, Kareem Abdul-Jabbar, miunduay.
S.PHON: karəəm abdur~ɾ-*abbar nar~ɾəʦuħan ʦiniza i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦaan, karəəm abdur~ɾ-*abbar, miunduaj.
